title: Store More Lifetime 15ft x 8ft Dual Edition Heavy Duty Plastic Shed
features: Heavy Duty Weather and UV-resistant High-density Polyethylene Plastic (HDPE) Construction
6xSmall Skylights, 2xLarge Skylights, 2xWindows, 2xDecorative Shutters, 2xPeg Strips, 1x90" Shelf, 4xCorner Shelves & 1xTool Corral
Easy two person assembly, using step by step instruction manual
description: From the manufacturer Heavy Duty Plastic Sheds UK Lifetime sheds are not only an attractive addition to your garden, but are the ideal solution for your outdoor storage needs. Keep all tools and garden equipment safe, dry, and conveniently located in the garden where you use them. No more rummaging through the house or garage. Several shelving units and peg strips are included to help you keep your tools organized and right at your fingertips. Low maintenance weather resistant design prevents fading and cracking. Best of all, no painting required. These sheds are at highly competitive prices. All Lifetime garden sheds have steeply pitched roofs for efficient water drainage, are very low maintenance and UV- protected to resist fading or cracking. All of which makes Lifetime sheds a durable storage solution. Materials Used in Lifetime Sheds High-Density Polyethylene Lifetime manufacture plastic sheds constructed of high-density polyethylene (HDPE). This is Lifetime’s material of choice because HDPE is known for its strength, durability, and resistance to chemicals and moisture. It is what makes Lifetime’s garden sheds lightweight, while maintaining superior strength and durability. Powder Coated Steel Lifetime’s rust-resistant, powder-coated finish makes these plastic sheds resistant to chips, scratches, and regular wear-and-tear. Powder-coating prevents rusting, corrosion and protects steel parts from UV-damage, making it a great all-weather finish. Advantages Sturdy Steel-Reinforced Construction Attractive Appearance and Design Dual-Wall High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) Construction Heavy-Duty Steel Trusses Provide Additional Roof Strength UV Protected to Prevent Weather Damage High-Pitched Roof Allows for Quick Drainage of Rain and Snow Lockable Steel-Reinforced Doors for Added Security Slip-Resistant High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) Floor Protects Against Oil, Solvents, and Stains Lifetime 7 feet x 7 feet Lifetime 8 feet by 10 feet Lifetime 8 feet by 12.5 feet Lifetime 8 feet by 2.5 feet Lifetime 8 feet by 5 feet Lifetime 8 feet by 7.5 feet

product_details_tab_data.Title: Store More Lifetime 15ft x 8ft Dual Edition Heavy Duty Plastic Shed
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always follow the assembly instructions carefully. This shed is heavy duty but requires two people for assembly. Ensure proper installation to maintain water resistance. Keep the shed away from open flames and heat sources.
